entries.name: description
entries.text: Top-level binding rules for routing and persistent ACP conversation ownership. Use type=route for normal routing and type=acp for persistent ACP harness bindings.

entries.name: text
entries.text: Choose a built-in profile to replace the current custom values.

entries.name: text
entries.text: Choose how much workspace context OpenClaw injects into each run. These profiles do not change your model, tools, channels, or theme.

entries.name: text
entries.text: Profiles only change bootstrap size and follow-up reinjection behavior.

entries.name: text
entries.text: Save Profile writes it as the default. Apply Now writes it and reloads the current session.

entries.name: text
entries.text: Open tweakcn.com, choose or create a theme, click Share, then paste the copied theme link here. Share links, editor URLs, registry URLs, theme IDs, and default theme names like amethyst-haze are accepted.
